title: What a godly man does while he waits for her
caption:
The man looking for a wife isn't ready for one.

He's rehearsing his pitch. Performing his readiness. Auditioning for a role in someone else's story. And she can tell in 20 minutes.

The man walking with God isn't thinking about what she wants. He's becoming someone worth interrupting.

Stop performing. Chase God, not a relationship. Let brotherhood do the formation. And hold the desire open-handed — not suppressed, not on the throne. Trust the Giver with the timing.

Delight yourself in the Lord, and he will give you the desires of your heart. — Psalm 37:4

Save this for the brother who keeps hunting before he's formed.

#faith #godlymen #christianmen #manofgod #relationships #discipline #christianity #scripture
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
